rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies a real naming/documentation mismatch confirmed in the diff: `includeRight`'s docstring claims 'Hopf algebra' while the signature only requires `[Algebra k A]`, making the namespace placement and docstring stronger than the statement. Review 1 misses this. Findings 2–3 are off-rubric (simp quality, not naming), but Finding 1 alone is sufficient to produce a better PR after correction.
